intro:
I couldn't find any information on Pamplethantha verticillata. However, I found Plectranthus verticillatus, also known as Plectranthus verticillatus or Plectranthus ciliatus. 

Plectranthus verticillatus is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of succulent herb. 
Plectranthus verticillatus has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. 
The bioactive constituents of this plant include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. 
Plectranthus verticillatus is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat fever, cough, and cold symptoms.
